chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-2126 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA No. 8469/25 (U/A). 2. For orders on o/objections. 3. For hearing of CMA No.8470/2025 (Ex/A) 4. For hearing of main case. 17.12.2025 Mr. Maqsood Ahmed Khoso, Advocate along with petitioners..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Granted subject to all just and legal exceptions. 4. Through this petition, petitioners are seeking quashment of FIR, which has been challaned before Court having jurisdiction. When confronted as to the ma intainability of the petition, the counsel for the petitioners submitted that petition may be converted in to the protective bail, as they have to approach before trial Court for proper relief. Under the circumstances, this petition is converted in to protective bail. The protective bail for a period of twenty days is granted to petitioners subject to furnishing P.R. bond in the sum of Rs.10,000/-(ten thousands) each, to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
